top3.sql:
SELECT Symptoms, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count
FROM Examination
WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE'
GROUP BY Symptoms
ORDER BY symptom_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Symptoms, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count
FROM Examination
GROUP BY Symptoms
ORDER BY symptom_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Symptoms, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count
FROM Examination
WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE'
GROUP BY Symptoms
ORDER BY symptom_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Symptoms, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count
FROM Examination
WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE'
GROUP BY Symptoms
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
  SELECT MAX(symptom_count)
  FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS symptom_count
    FROM Examination
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE'
    GROUP BY Symptoms
  )
);

SELECT Symptoms, COUNT(*) AS symptom_count
FROM Examination
GROUP BY Symptoms
ORDER BY symptom_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM Examination
WHERE Diagnosis = 'SLE'
GROUP BY Symptoms
